hero.title: About IG Water Treatment International
hero.subtitle: Innovation and Leadership in Water Treatment Since 2017

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Founded in 2017 by Ivan Garcia, IG Water Treatment International was born from three decades of passion for water treatment solutions.
story.paragraph2: With cutting-edge technology and vertically integrated operations — from design to manufacturing to distribution — we deliver comprehensive water treatment solutions that transform lives.
story.paragraph3: Our commitment to innovation and quality has positioned us as a trusted partner for residential, commercial, and industrial clients worldwide.

0.title: Proprietary Production
0.description: We go beyond distribution — we engineer our own water treatment products. Managing the entire production process in-house ensures the highest standards in quality, customization, and innovation.

1.title: International Reach
1.description: Our impact goes beyond Orlando. We've delivered water treatment solutions across the globe — from Latin America to Africa — helping communities access reliable, clean water.

2.title: Well Water Leadership
2.description: We tackle issues such as mineral buildup, contaminant removal, and system optimization. Our specialized team ensures every well delivers clean, safe, and dependable water.

3.title: Custom Solutions
3.description: Every home and business has distinct needs. Whether it's softening hard water, descaling pipelines, or developing a comprehensive purification system — we tailor everything.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.statement: We don't just treat water — we transform lives. Our commitment is to offer sustainable, efficient, and trusted water treatment solutions.

founder.title: Founder & CEO
founder.quote: When you think of water, think of IG Water Treatment International. We don't just sell water treatment systems — we offer peace of mind.
founder.name: Ivan Danilo Garcia

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Water Quality?

consulting.description: We provide strategic consulting for drinking water and wastewater treatment projects. From initial evaluation to full system implementation, our customized solutions ensure performance, safety, and regulatory compliance.

technology.subtitle: Advanced water treatment technologies for every application

softening.title: Softening Resins
softening.description: Tailored solutions for specific water profiles

sustainability.title: Sustainability Commitment
sustainability.description: Environmental care is at the heart of everything we do. We are committed to responsible, sustainable practices that ensure water safety while preserving ecological balance.

support.title: Dedicated Support
support.description: From product selection to post-installation, we provide personalized service every step of the way. Our team offers ongoing technical assistance and responsive communication to ensure your systems perform at their best.

hero.title: Parts & Components
hero.subtitle: Top-quality parts at exceptional value — filters, tanks, valves, minerals, and complete assembled equipment.

residential.title: Residential Tanks
residential.description: Black tanks, residential equipment, and RO systems for home water treatment.

commercial.title: Commercial Tanks
commercial.description: Blue tanks and medium-scale filtration units for commercial applications.

industrial.title: Industrial Tanks
industrial.description: Large-scale industrial treatment tanks for heavy-duty water processing.

clack.title: Clack Valves
clack.description: 3-button, 5-button, and control valve configurations for precise water treatment control.

fleck.title: Fleck Valves
fleck.description: Fleck 2510, 2570, 3150, and Autotrol models for reliable system operation.

activatedCarbon.title: Activated Carbon Catalyst
activatedCarbon.description: Filters chlorine, chloramine, herbicides, and pesticides. Eliminates unpleasant tastes and odors.

anionicResin.title: Anionic Resin
anionicResin.description: Reduces sulfates, nitrates, and chlorides for cleaner water.

cationicResin.title: Cationic Resin
cationicResin.description: Polymeric ion exchange for effective water softening.

kdf.title: KDF
kdf.description: Eliminates chlorine, iron, hydrogen sulfide, calcium carbonate, magnesium, chromium, bacteria, algae, and fungi.

garnet.title: Garnet
garnet.description: Retains suspended solids for fine particle filtration.

advice.title: Professional Advice
advice.description: Our experts help you select the right equipment for each project, providing continuous technical support and after-sales assistance.

hero.title: Professional Water Testing Services
hero.subtitle: Know What's in Your Water — Protect Your Health
hero.description: Whether city water or private well, knowing what you're drinking is essential.

types.title: Testing Services
types.subtitle: Comprehensive water analysis for every parameter

contaminants.title: Invisible Contaminants
contaminants.description: Many contaminants are colorless, tasteless, and odorless — making regular testing the only reliable safeguard.

safety.title: Safety Standards
safety.description: Maximum Contaminant Levels (MCLs) are set by federal and state authorities to protect public health.

quality.title: Water Quality Risks
quality.description: Common issues include aging infrastructure, agricultural runoff, chemical spills, and unregulated private wells.

comparison.title: City Water vs. Well Water Testing

city.title: City Water Testing
city.description: Municipal water systems require regular monitoring for treatment byproducts and infrastructure contaminants.

well.title: Well Water Testing
well.description: Private wells are unregulated and must be tested regularly for natural and man-made contaminants.

items.4: Pesticides, herbicides, and volatile organic compounds

0.title: Daily Water Need
0.description: Every person needs 20-50 liters of clean water daily for drinking, cooking, and hygiene.

1.title: Annual Deaths
1.description: Over 1.8 million people die annually from waterborne illnesses worldwide.

2.title: Ecosystem Impact
2.description: Contaminated water affects humans, plants, animals, and ecosystems without exception.

cta.title: Let's Test Your Water Today
cta.description: Get a professional water analysis and take the first step toward clean, safe water for your home or business.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our water treatment services.

q1.question: What services do you offer?
q1.answer: We provide installation, maintenance, repair, and upgrade of residential, commercial, and industrial water treatment systems.

q2.question: What types of parts do you offer?
q2.answer: We offer filters, RO membranes, flow meters, valves, pumps, and more — all top-quality components.

q3.question: How do I know which system is right for me?
q3.answer: Our experts provide personalized consultation based on your local water quality, intended use, and budget.

q4.question: What's the installation process?
q4.answer: We provide full service from site planning to equipment installation, configuration, and testing.

q5.question: Do you offer maintenance services?
q5.answer: Yes, we offer preventive maintenance including inspections, cleaning, water quality testing, and part replacement.

q6.question: What's your warranty policy?
q6.answer: We provide warranties on all parts and accessories with repair or replacement coverage.

q7.question: What if I have a problem with my system?
q7.answer: Contact us for phone support, on-site service, or troubleshooting guidance.
